summary: Add a bulk export endpoint for the audit log.

approach.description: Add GET /v0/audit/export with --from and --to query parameters.
Stream JSON Lines from audit_entries with cursor-based pagination.

verification.test_strategy: Integration test under backend/internal/api/audit_export_test.go uses testcontainers Postgres, seeds entries, asserts pagination cursor stability.
verification.rollback_plan: Revert the PR. The endpoint is purely additive; no data migration to roll back.

risks_and_assumptions: Assumes (created_at, entry_id) is the natural sort order.
Risk: very large date ranges; mitigated by per-page limit of 1000 rows.
